name: Mindy, TG in the Shower
description:
You were warned, peeking on the cheersquad taking showers would lead to trouble. Now, you're going to have a good reason to see them up close, Mindy will be sure of that.

Perhaps that's what you wanted all along. Afterall, you were admiring all of a woman's best features, and perhaps that was out of jealousy.

You'll have no choice, you're going to be a popular addition to the cheersquad and you're going to like it!

Back to a classic TG, I hope you enjoy! I wanted to make something delightfully naughty.

Just don't be a perv IRL, it's not good, there will be no TG in real life and it's creepy.

As usual, give me your feedback, good or bad, I'm happy to know what you think! <3
creator: aspectdoll
